title: [circt-verilog-lsp] MaxCapForcesFlushDuringContinuousTyping fails with valgrind
body:
CI run: https://github.com/llvm/circt/actions/runs/18375617219

The test spawned a background [typer](https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/f585d9a842844d6b750bbda5e022fd5d328db326/unittests/Tools/circt-verilog-lsp-server/Utils/PendingChangesTest.cpp#L169-L175) thread to simulate continuous typing, but immediately scheduled a debounce check without waiting for the typer to actually run. Due to non-deterministic thread scheduling, the typer might not have enqueued any changes yet, causing the test to fail unpredictably.
